session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**Exit Code: 2 (FAILURE)**
### Summary The fast-ci target failed due to Prettier formatting issues. Most checks passed, but the Prettier check found code style violations.
### Detailed Results
**Prettier Check - FAILED** - 2 files have code style issues: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - Message: "Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix."
**Linting - PASSED** - All checks passed
**Format Check - PASSED** - 1728 files already formatted
**Markdown Check - PASSED**
**Exec Reference Check - PASSED** - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date
**Type Check (ty) - PASSED** - All checks passed
**Unit Tests (erk) - PASSED** - 5990 passed in 13.11s
**Tests (erk-dev) - PASSED** - 136 passed in 5.39s
**Tests (erk-statusline) - PASSED** - 115 passed in 0.75s
**Tests (erk-mcp) - PASSED** - 50 passed (output truncated)
**CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Validation - PASSED** - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired - 19 CLAUDE.md files checked - 0 violations
The pipeline failed at the Prettier formatting check before completing the erk-mcp tests. The issues are in two markdown documentation files that do not conform to Prettier code style.
